description_long: This is a large, rustic log cabin set on a landscaped plot with multiple levels of hedges, stone pathways, and coniferous trees. The cabin features a prominent dark brown gabled roof with several dormers and stone chimneys, and its exterior walls are constructed from thick, rounded logs. The front approach is marked by a circular stone plaza and symmetrical stairways leading up to the main entrance, which is sheltered by a covered porch supported by log columns. The windows are rectangular and arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some grouped in pairs and others standing alone. The rear and side views reveal additional entrances, a small garden plot, and a fenced area, suggesting multiple access points and outdoor living spaces. The overall setting evokes a traditional log cabin style, blending natural materials with a carefully manicured landscape.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a dark gabled roof, stone chimneys, and landscaped grounds featuring hedges, stone paths, and coniferous trees. The structure includes a covered porch, symmetrical stairways, and multiple windows and doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical stairways, circular stone plaza, and manicured hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabin, the gabled roof, two large coniferous trees, and the stone pathways leading around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrances, a small garden plot, and the full width of the cabin with visible log construction and stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear porch, additional fencing, and the sloped landscaping with stone retaining walls.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with multiple intersecting gables, deep overhangs, and stone chimneys
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows arranged symmetrically on the front and rear facades, with some paired and others single; windows are evenly spaced and of medium size
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door centered on the front facade under the porch, with additional doors visible on the rear and side facades
